description: From the manufacturer Durable Daily Use Design Instant Plug & Play Consistent, High-Quality Audio Extra Reach for Flexibility AV:Link | 3m 3.5mm Stereo Plug to 3.5mm Stereo Plug Audio Lead – Universal Aux Cable for PC, Car, Smartphone, Tablet, Headphones, Portable Audio Devices | Black 3.0 Metre Enjoy flexible connections with the AV:LINK 3m 3.5mm stereo audio lead. Ideal for linking smartphones, tablets, laptops, car stereos, or headphones, it delivers clear, balanced audio for music, podcasts, and calls. Its 3m length gives you freedom to move around while staying connected. Simple, durable, and universally compatible, it’s the everyday audio solution for home, office, or travel. PRODUCT FEATURES: Extra Reach for Flexibility | 3m length allows easy connection across rooms, desks, or car interiors Consistent, High-Quality Audio | Standard 3.5mm stereo connectors provide clear, balanced sound for music, calls, and media Instant Plug & Play | Ready to use straight from the packet with no drivers or setup Durable Daily Use Design | 3.2mm cable with sturdy connectors built to last through everyday use Wide Device Compatibility | Works with phones, tablets, PCs, laptops, car stereos, headphones, and other 3.5mm devices BOX CONTAINS: 1 x AV:Link 3m 3.5mm stereo audio lead SPECIFICATION: Cable length: 3 metres Cable diameter: 3.2mm Core: 10 x 0.10mm Weight: Approx. 90g Connectors: 3.5mm stereo male to male Compatible with: Phones, tablets, PCs, laptops, car stereos, headphones, and other 3.5mm devices
